item.title: Vakatawa’s comeback adds emotion to Flying Fijians’ biggest test yet After a heart condition ended his France career, Virimi Vakatawa is on the verge of a dream test return for Fiji in the Nations Championship.
item.description: After a heart condition ended his France career, Virimi Vakatawa is on the verge of a dream test return for Fiji in the Nations Championship.

item.title: ‘Here for a reason’: Josiah Maama living out his NBA dream From Glen Innes to the San Antonio Spurs, the proud Tongan coach says years of sacrifice have prepared him for basketball’s biggest stage.
item.description: From Glen Innes to the San Antonio Spurs, the proud Tongan coach says years of sacrifice have prepared him for basketball’s biggest stage.

item.title: Pacific power drives Blues to Origin glory New South Wales stun Queensland 30-12 in front of Pacific leaders to reclaim the State of Origin Shield.
item.description: New South Wales stun Queensland 30-12 in front of Pacific leaders to reclaim the State of Origin Shield.

item.title: ‘We are family now’: Sāmoa, Tonga leaders strengthen Pacific bonds with Australia Laaulialemalietoa and Lord Fakafanua say relationships must go beyond security, with people, sports, labour mobility and shared history.
item.description: Laaulialemalietoa and Lord Fakafanua say relationships must go beyond security, with people, sports, labour mobility and shared history.

item.title: Papua New Guinea
item.description: Papua New Guinea, Tonga, Sāmoa and Fiji will share in a major partnership aimed at growing the game from grassroots fields to the international stage.
item.content:encoded: Papua New Guinea, Tonga, Sāmoa and Fiji will share in a major partnership aimed at growing the game from grassroots fields to the international stage.

item.title: From super typhoons to record cold: Pacific faces extreme weather A storm batters the Marianas, Tonga records its coldest temperature ever and PNG communities worry after frost destroys food gardens.
item.description: A storm batters the Marianas, Tonga records its coldest temperature ever and PNG communities worry after frost destroys food gardens.

item.title: Fiji, Sāmoa and Tonga name squads for new rugby tournaments Pacific teams are set to test themselves against top-tier opposition across three continents.
item.description: Pacific teams are set to test themselves against top-tier opposition across three continents.

item.title: Pacific filmmakers earn a seat at the Academy Awards voting table A Tongan-New Zealand film-maker and Sāmoan director have been invited to join the Academy behind the Oscars.
item.description: A Tongan-New Zealand film-maker and Sāmoan director have been invited to join the Academy behind the Oscars.
